name: Golden Treasure Pie
recipeInstructions:
Use the small curd type of creamed cottage cheese for this recipe.
1. Combine the undrained pineapple, 1/2 cup sugar, cornstarch and water in a small saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil. Continue cooking for 1 minute more. Remove from the heat and cool to room temperature.
2. In a bowl, combine 2 3/4 cups sugar and butter. Beat with an electric mixer set on medium speed until well blended. Add flour, cottage cheese, vanilla, and salt. Beat until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in milk.
4. Pour pineapple mixture into the unbaked pie shell. Slowly pour the cottage cheese mixture over the pineapple layer, being careful not to disturb the first layer.
5. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes. Reduce temperature to 325°F and bake an additional 45 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack and serve at room temperature.
